steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The strongest clue is the phrase “would have been forced to _____ the throne.” The sentence argues that understanding legitimacy characteristics is essential. The logic reveals that without these characteristics, the monarch would be forced to do something to the throne — identifying what that is gives us the answer.

steps.title: Match to the correct meaning
steps.content: Abandon means to give up or renounce — exactly the action a monarch would take with the throne when lacking legitimacy. The other choices (reciprocate, annotate, equalize) fail to express power loss or create nonsensical phrases. That matches choice C — C is correct.
